senses.gloss: the tip of the penis, the glans

examples.text: رَأَتْ كَمَرًا مِثْلَ الجَلَامِيدِ فُتِّحَتْ … أَحَالِيلُهَا لَمَّا ٱتْمَأَرَّتْ جُذُورُهَا
examples.english: She saw glandes like boulders … their piss-pipes unfurling volubly when their bases stiffened

examples.text: قَالَ أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْمُعْتَزِلِيُّ: وَدَدْتُ لَوْ أَنَّ كَمَرَتَيْنِ فِي رَأْسِي، حَتَى إِذَا جَامَعْتُ أَدْخُلَ كَمَا أَنَا فِي حِرِ الْمَرْأَةِ.
examples.english: ʾAbū Ḵālid the Muʿtazilite once said, "I wish there were a double glans on my head so that, when I make love, I can slide whole inside the woman's orifice."

senses.gloss: beam, girder, what is somewhere on top and bears load

etymology.text:
From English camera.

From Ancient Greek καμάρᾱ (kamárā) or Latin camara.
